final:
// // This module selects the destination register address based on the RegDst signal. When RegDst is high (1), the output RegAddr will select the address from Rt; when RegDst is low (0), it will select from Rd.
module top_module(
	 input  RegDst,           
	 input  [4:0] Rt,         
	 input  [4:0] Rd,         
	 output  [4:0] RegAddr    
    );assign RegAddr = RegDst ? Rd : Rt;endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module selects the destination register address based on the RegDst signal. When RegDst is high (1), the output RegAddr will select the address from Rt; when RegDst is low (0), it will select from Rd.
